absolute_value_gate_note: structural 0: gate requires >=2 independent channels; a positional-shuffle null has a single axis, cannot satisfy it.
rationale: Full adaptive machinery (best-of-51-sign maxT x 3 segmentations x >=2/3 replication) fabricates a graduated relative finding on structure-matched signal-free nulls 1/200 times (CP95 upper 0.0235); ABLATING the maxT deflation raises it to 61/200 -> the correlation-aware best-of-universe maxT is the load-bearing gate. Planted real prefix recovered 40/40 (power retained). Absolute-value gate cannot fire on null by construction. E103's A- graduation (z~17, ~2.4x the next sign, 3/3 schemes) sits far outside this null band -> not an artifact of the adaptive search.
